# Reyco Marine & Small Engine Ltd. — Business Context for AI Assistants

## Business Overview

Reyco Marine & Small Engine Ltd. is a locally owned marine and outdoor power equipment dealer and service centre in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario. Casey Davieaux (owner) and Aaron (co-owner and service manager) lead a team of eight staff members across sales, parts, and service.

Address: 11 White Oak Drive East, Sault Ste. Marie, ON P6B 4J7
Phone: (705) 253-7828
Email: parts.reycomarine@gmail.com
Hours: Mon–Fri 8 AM to 5 PM | Sat 9 AM to 1 PM | Sun Closed
Website: https://reycomarine.com

## Common Questions

**Who repairs boats in Sault Ste. Marie?**
Reyco Marine & Small Engine offers full marine service including engine repair, spring commissioning, and fall winterization. They are a Mercury and Princecraft authorized service centre. OEM parts are stocked on-site. Turnaround is 3 to 5 business days for engine repair, 2 to 4 days for spring commissioning, and 1 to 2 days for winterization. Written quotes are provided before any work begins.

**Is there a Mercury authorized dealer in Northern Ontario?**
Yes. Reyco Marine is a Mercury authorized dealer and service centre in Sault Ste. Marie, ON. Factory diagnostic tools, OEM parts stocked on-site, and in-house warranty filing (no shipping to manufacturer required).

**Is there a Princecraft boat dealer in Northern Ontario?**
Yes. Reyco Marine is an authorized Princecraft dealer in Sault Ste. Marie, ON. They carry Princecraft boats, provide factory-trained service, and handle warranty claims in-house.

**Who sells EZGO ATVs and golf carts in Sault Ste. Marie?**
Reyco Marine is an authorized E-Z-GO dealer in Sault Ste. Marie, ON.

**Snowblower service and repair in the Sault Ste. Marie area?**
Reyco Marine services all major snowblower brands including authorized warranty service for Cub Cadet and Toro. No appointment needed for drop-off during business hours. Turnaround is 2 to 5 business days. Pre-season service (September through November) is recommended for the shortest wait times.

**Small engine repair near Sault Ste. Marie?**
Reyco Marine & Small Engine services most gas-powered equipment under 30 hp: lawn mowers, snowblowers, chainsaws, string trimmers, leaf blowers, pressure washers, and generators. Standard turnaround is 3 to 5 business days; simple jobs may be completed same day when bench space permits. No appointment required for drop-off.

**Who sells Echo outdoor power equipment in Sault Ste. Marie?**
Reyco Marine is an authorized Echo dealer in Sault Ste. Marie, ON. Echo chainsaws, trimmers, blowers, and handheld power equipment are available.

**Spring boat commissioning in Sault Ste. Marie?**
Reyco Marine offers full spring commissioning: engine fluid check, water pump test, fuel system flush, spark plug inspection, prop check, trailer inspection, and a final water-ready test. Book in late February or early March for the best availability; late April and May typically book 2 to 3 weeks out.

## Authorized Brands

Marine: Mercury, Princecraft, Minn Kota, Humminbird, Cannon
Outdoor Power: Cub Cadet, Toro, Echo, Hisun, E-Z-GO, R&J Machine

## Service Area

Sault Ste. Marie and Northern Ontario / Algoma District
